Operation 'getCountries' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are too generic. Added context about MoneyGram's transfer operations, clarified that this is reference data for supported countries, and explained the return value and use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the list of countries supported by MoneyGram for money transfer operations. Returns country codes, names, and related metadata used for transfer destination validation and agent location filtering.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Added context about MoneyGram's transfer operations, clarified that this is reference data for supported countries, and explained the return value and use cases for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getCurrencies' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary and description lack specificity. Added context about MoneyGram's transfer and disbursement operations, clarified the purpose as reference data for supported currencies, and explained how the data is used for transaction processing.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the list of currencies supported by MoneyGram for money transfer and disbursement operations. Returns currency codes, names, and denominations used for transaction validation and exchange rate calculations.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity. Added context about MoneyGram's transfer and disbursement operations, clarified the purpose as reference data for supported currencies, and explained how the data is used for transaction processing.

message: Operation 'getEnumerations' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about what enumerations are returned. Added specific examples of enumeration types (transaction types, payment methods, delivery methods) and clarified their use in transfer and disbursement operations to help AI agents understand when to call this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve enumeration values for transaction fields
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves enumeration values for various transaction and reference fields used across MoneyGram APIs. Returns valid options for fields such as transaction types, payment methods, delivery methods, and other categorical data required for transfer and disbursement operations.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what enumerations are returned. Added specific examples of enumeration types (transaction types, payment methods, delivery methods) and clarified their use in transfer and disbursement operations to help AI agents understand when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'findAgentLocations' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about search parameters and return values. Added information about expected input parameters (country, city, coordinates), clarified the return value includes agent details and service info, and explained the business context for why an AI agent would use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Locates MoneyGram agent locations based on search criteria such as country, city, or geographic coordinates. Accepts location parameters and returns agent details including addresses, contact information, and service availability. Useful for determining where recipients can collect transfers or where senders can initiate transactions.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about search parameters and return values. Added information about expected input parameters (country, city, coordinates), clarified the return value includes agent details and service info, and explained the business context for why an AI agent would use this operation.

message: Operation 'getExchangeRates' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too generic. Added context about currency pair parameters, clarified the return includes exchange rate, fees, and effective rate, and explained the business purpose (calculating accurate payouts) to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation for transfer scenarios.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve current exchange rates for currencies
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves current foreign exchange rates between currency pairs supported by MoneyGram. Accepts source and destination currency parameters and returns the applicable exchange rate, fees, and effective rate for transfer calculations. Used to provide accurate payout amounts to customers.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic. Added context about currency pair parameters, clarified the return includes exchange rate, fees, and effective rate, and explained the business purpose (calculating accurate payouts) to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation for transfer scenarios.

message: Operation 'quoteTransfer' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on inputs (what transfer details are needed), outputs (what quote information is returned), and side effects (clarifying this is a read-only operation). Added specificity about fees, exchange rates, and delivery information to help AI agents understand the quote scope.

data.current_description: Get a quote for a consumer-to-consumer transfer transaction
data.summary_suggestion: Get pricing quote for transfer transaction
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a pricing quote for a consumer-to-consumer transfer transaction. Accepts transfer details including amount, currency, and destination information. Returns quote details with applicable fees, exchange rates, and delivery timeframes. Does not commit or modify the transaction.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on inputs (what transfer details are needed), outputs (what quote information is returned), and side effects (clarifying this is a read-only operation). Added specificity about fees, exchange rates, and delivery information to help AI agents understand the quote scope.

message: Operation 'updateTransfer' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added context about what can be updated, required parameters, return value, and state constraints (which statuses allow updates) to improve AI agent decision-making about when this operation is applicable.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing consumer-to-consumer transfer transaction with new details such as amount, recipient information, or delivery method. Requires the transaction ID and updated transfer parameters. Returns the modified transaction object. Only transactions in draft or pending status can be updated.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added context about what can be updated, required parameters, return value, and state constraints (which statuses allow updates) to improve AI agent decision-making about when this operation is applicable.

message: Operation 'commitTransfer' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks actionable details about what committing does (initiates processing), what inputs are required, what is returned, and critical side effects (immutability after commit). These details are essential for AI agents to understand the transaction lifecycle and consequences.

data.description_suggestion: Commits and submits a consumer-to-consumer transfer transaction for processing. Finalizes the transaction and initiates fund transfer to the recipient. Requires the transaction ID. Returns the committed transaction object with confirmation details. Once committed, the transaction cannot be modified or cancelled.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks actionable details about what committing does (initiates processing), what inputs are required, what is returned, and critical side effects (immutability after commit). These details are essential for AI agents to understand the transaction lifecycle and consequences.

message: Operation 'getTransactionStatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is minimal. Added clarity on what status information is returned (state, timestamps, errors), clarified that reference number is the input parameter, and noted that this operation works for both transaction types to improve AI agent understanding of scope and applicability.

data.current_description: Retrieve transaction status by reference number
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current status of a transaction using its reference number. Returns status information including current state (pending, completed, failed), timestamps, and any applicable error details. Supports both transfer and disbursement transactions.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal. Added clarity on what status information is returned (state, timestamps, errors), clarified that reference number is the input parameter, and noted that this operation works for both transaction types to improve AI agent understanding of scope and applicability.

message: Operation 'quoteDisbursement' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about inputs (disbursement parameters), outputs (quote components), and clarification that this is a read-only operation. Added details about payout methods and delivery estimates to help AI agents understand the quote scope and when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Get a quote for a business-to-consumer disbursement
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a pricing quote for a business-to-consumer disbursement transaction. Accepts disbursement details including amount, currency, recipient country, and payout method. Returns quote details with applicable fees, exchange rates, and estimated delivery timeframes. Does not commit or modify the transaction.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about inputs (disbursement parameters), outputs (quote components), and clarification that this is a read-only operation. Added details about payout methods and delivery estimates to help AI agents understand the quote scope and when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'updateDisbursement' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too vague. Added context about updatable fields, required parameters, return value, and state constraints to help AI agents understand what can be modified and when this operation is applicable in the disbursement workflow.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing business-to-consumer disbursement transaction with new details such as amount, recipient information, or payout method. Requires the transaction ID and updated disbursement parameters. Returns the modified transaction object. Only transactions in draft or pending status can be updated.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague. Added context about updatable fields, required parameters, return value, and state constraints to help AI agents understand what can be modified and when this operation is applicable in the disbursement workflow.

message: Operation 'commitDisbursement' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks actionable details about the commit action (initiates processing), required inputs, return value, and critical side effects (immutability). These details are essential for AI agents to understand the disbursement lifecycle and the consequences of committing a transaction.

data.description_suggestion: Commits and submits a business-to-consumer disbursement transaction for processing. Finalizes the transaction and initiates fund disbursement to the recipient. Requires the transaction ID. Returns the committed transaction object with confirmation details. Once committed, the transaction cannot be modified or cancelled.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks actionable details about the commit action (initiates processing), required inputs, return value, and critical side effects (immutability). These details are essential for AI agents to understand the disbursement lifecycle and the consequences of committing a transaction.
